isi.lyrics:
Lyric Seung-i - Sunlight

Romanization

hey neo dareun aegihajimalgo jigeum neukkineun daero malhae
hey na sasil jeombu algo isseo urin teukbyeolhan sairanggeol
hey na dareun geon da piryo eopgo ojik neo hanamaneul barae
Today nan neorang gati itgo sipeo oneul bam mam ganeundaero

ah ah ah ah ah
hey hey hey
nal kkwak anabwa

sunlight uril bichwojuneun highlight
moonlight igeon neowa naman aneun sain
sunlight i bam gagi jeone malhae
eonjengga gyesok nal gidarimyeo baraewatdago

tell me neoui bimildo
deonjyeo neoui geokjeongdo
tell me nawa gateun mamiramyeon
nareul bichuneun yuilhan neoui Heart

hey neo unneun iyu naneun ara sasil neoman nal bonggeo anya
hey eosaekhan gonggimajeo joa jipjunghaebwa ne modeunggeol
say ta beorildeuthan maeum ije
say now say now
lay down nuga mworaedo nan jeoldae
neol nochi aneulgeoya
ah ah ah ah ah

sunlight uril bichwojuneun highlight
moonlight igeon neowa naman aneun sain
sunlight i bam gagi jeone malhae
eonjengga gyesok nal gidarimyeo baraewatdago

tell me neoui bimildo
deonjyeo neoui geokjeongdo
tell me nawa gateun mamiramyeon
nareul bichuneun yuilhan neoui Heart

neon ihaeandoegetjiman

we shine brighter now
we are here to stay
we are born to shine
we light up the dark

neohuin moreulsudo itjiman
urin yeogie
yeongwonhi gieok dwae
malhae geunyang saranghandago

sunlight dosireul bichwojuneun highlight
moonlight neoga naege naeryeo on sunggan
sunlight eonjengga ithyeojil spotlight
eonjena ne gieoge yeongwontorok namgo sipdago

tell me naege gidaedo dwae
touch me nado gateun maeumiya
kiss me yeongwonhi ne gyeote itdago
neoreul bichuneun yuilhan oneul light

kiss me yeongwonhi ne gyeote itdago
neoreul bichuneun yuilhan oneul light



Hangeul

hey 너 다른 애기하지말고 지금 느끼는 대로 말해
hey 나 사실 전부 알고 있어 우린 특별한 사이란걸
hey 나 다른 건 다 필요 없고 오직 너 하나만을 바래
Today 난 너랑 같이 있고 싶어 오늘 밤 맘 가는대로

ah ah ah ah ah
hey hey hey
날 꽉 안아봐

sunlight 우릴 비춰주는 highlight
moonlight 이건 너와 나만 아는 사인
sunlight 이 밤 가기 전에 말해
언젠가 계속 날 기다리며 바래왔다고

tell me 너의 비밀도
던져 너의 걱정도
tell me 나와 같은 맘이라면
나를 비추는 유일한 너의 Heart

hey 너 웃는 이유 나는 알아 사실 너만 날 본거 아냐
hey 어색한 공기마저 좋아 집중해봐 네 모든걸
say 타 버릴듯한 마음 이제
say now say now
lay down 누가 뭐래도 난 절대
널 놓치 않을거야
ah ah ah ah ah

sunlight 우릴 비춰주는 highlight
moonlight 이건 너와 나만 아는 사인
sunlight 이 밤 가기 전에 말해
언젠가 계속 날 기다리며 바래왔다고

tell me 너의 비밀도
던져 너의 걱정도
tell me 나와 같은 맘이라면
나를 비추는 유일한 너의 Heart

넌 이해안되겠지만

we shine brighter now
we are here to stay
we are born to shine
we light up the dark

너흰 모를수도 있지만
우린 여기에
영원히 기억 돼
말해 그냥 사랑한다고

sunlight 도시를 비춰주는 highlight
moonlight 너가 내게 내려 온 순간
sunlight 언젠가 잊혀질 spotlight
언제나 네 기억에 영원토록 남고 싶다고

tell me 내게 기대도 돼
touch me 나도 같은 마음이야
kiss me 영원히 네 곁에 있다고
너를 비추는 유일한 오늘 light

kiss me 영원히 네 곁에 있다고
너를 비추는 유일한 오늘 light

isi.lyrics:
Lyric late - only yesterday

Romanization

My hands are getting cold
Losing myself is getting way too old
I just need my way out of my head
But I don’t have it in me anymore
In a people, they be talking about
Saying no, every time
I don’t know what you are missing
It’s time to say goodbye,
Even if it’s done

nae jasine daehae manjokhan jeogeopgeodeun
gibun nappahaneun saramdeuldo piryo eopgeodeun
naege dongjeongsimeul pyohago
naege joeoneul haejugo geunde mollae biutgoinne
Leave me alone

Hangeul

My hands are getting cold
Losing myself is getting way too old
I just need my way out of my head
But I don’t have it in me anymore
In a people, they be talking about
Saying no, every time
I don’t know what you are missing
It’s time to say goodbye,
Even if it’s done

내 자신에 대해 만족한 적없거든
기분 나빠하는 사람들도 필요 없거든
내게 동정심을 표하고
내게 조언을 해주고 근데 몰래 비웃고있네
Leave me alone
isi.lyrics_timestamp:
My hands are getting cold
Losing myself is getting way too old 
I just need my way out of my head 
But I don’t have it in me anymore 
In a people, they be talking about  
Saying no, every time
I don’t know what you are missing 
It’s time to say goodbye, 
Even if it’s done 

내 자신에 대해 만족한 적없거든
기분 나빠하는 사람들도 필요 없거든 
내게 동정심을 표하고
내게 조언을 해주고 근데 몰래 비웃고있네 
Leave me alone

isi.lyrics:
Lyric late - someone like you

Romanization

I want us to get it right
Leave all of your tears by your bedside
You the only one who would understands
(But your running around)
I want us to love again
And honestly I'll be by your side
Im the only one who would understands
(Shawty Wanna!)

Can you just hold me close,
I’ll never leave, I won’t let go
tto haruga jinaedo
oneureun make it right
To give you my best try
And to give you my all

I said now oh oh oh
Love is all we need
Oh
Oh
Oh
Oh
(Since you’ve been gone away for too long)

So don’t change your mind
When you left me
I start to loose myself
Where the hell I went wrong
I need you
Around me because
We being together

Hangeul
